title: Converging Panels 4
description: A soft, blurred gradient background dominated by vibrant green tones with subtle radial light effects. The primary color is a bright, saturated green (#06d434) that serves as the base, with lighter lime-green highlights creating a glowing center point around coordinates (0.23, 0.29). The image exhibits a smooth, bokeh-like quality with soft-focus areas that transition from bright green in the center to darker forest-green at the edges. A kaleidoscopic effect with 6 segments creates subtle symmetrical patterns overlaid on the gradient, though the effect is very subtle due to low reach settings (0.05). The overall atmosphere is ethereal and dreamy, with a vignette-like darkening toward the corners. Fine film grain texture (0.2 strength) is applied uniformly across the surface, adding a subtle cinematic quality. The lighting appears to come from the upper-left quadrant, with ambient intensity at 96% creating a luminous, glowing quality. The blend mode of luminosity enhances the light-based appearance, making the effect feel like soft, diffused light passing through a translucent medium.
